title: The Startup Office
content: The startup office occupied a modest space filled with whiteboards, laptops, and endless ideas. Every morning, team members gathered for a brief meeting to discuss progress and priorities. Unlike larger organizations, everyone performed multiple roles and contributed wherever help was needed. Developers participated in product discussions, while designers shared feedback about customer experience. The atmosphere was energetic and sometimes chaotic, but creativity flourished in that environment. Long hours were common, especially before product releases. Despite the challenges, employees enjoyed the opportunity to build something new and see their contributions directly influence the company’s growth.
